# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do **not** open a public issue for security problems.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting instead: go to the repository's
**Security** tab → **Report a vulnerability** (or open
https://github.com/QwackStack/FlockUnitySdk/security/advisories/new).
You'll get a response there, and a fix will be coordinated before any public disclosure.

## Supported versions

Only the latest release on the [releases page](https://github.com/QwackStack/FlockUnitySdk/releases)
receives security fixes.
